summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of SOIN collaborative development platform. Session persistence issue from previous iteration has been RESOLVED. Core functionality working excellently with beautiful UI. Real-time chat features not working due to WebSocket connection issues.

integration_issues.issue: Chat messages are not appearing after being sent. WebSocket connection failures preventing Socket.io real-time functionality
integration_issues.technical_details: Console shows 'WebSocket connection to wss://... failed: WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'

passed_tests: Backend health check and all API endpoints (13/13)
Login page loads with proper styling and form elements
Login flow authentication and dashboard redirect
Dashboard shows welcome message and New Project button
Project creation modal opens and functions correctly
Project creation and navigation to workspace
Workspace 3-column layout (Chat panel, Code Editor, File Tree)
Collaborators panel opens and closes properly
Run button and preview panel functionality
Session persistence - users stay logged in during navigation
Project card navigation from dashboard to workspace
Logout functionality and redirect to login page
Register page navigation and form elements
Dark theme with orange accents implementation
All interactive UI elements are clickable and responsive

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (core flows working, real-time chat issue only)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket/Socket.io connection issues preventing real-time chat functionality. Console shows WebSocket connection failures. The session persistence issue from previous iteration has been successfully resolved.
